items.name: Ostrichsized Winter Scarf
items.description: What does it mean to be Ostrichsized?  Ostrichsized means kicking in the teeth of any man who chooses to fight a horse-sized duck over a hundred duck sized horses.  It means fighting robotic dinosaurs with a laser sword dipped in unicorn tears for fun.  It means wearing a scarf for a California winter.
